author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو محمد عبد الله بن محمد بن جعفر بن حيان الأصبهاني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and historian from Isfahan, known for his compilations in hadith and prophetic biography.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A significant contribution to the literature on the Prophet's character and manners, compiling hadith reports and narratives.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the early comprehensive works focusing specifically on the moral and ethical qualities of the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Saleh bin Muhammad al-Wunyan is a known scholar in hadith studies with several critical editions to his credit.
